title: lycium arborescens
intro: Lycium arborescens, also known as the desert wolfberry or boxthorn, is a deciduous shrub native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The health benefits of Lycium arborescens include its potential to support eye health, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of certain cancers, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve overall well-being. Lycium arborescens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
